creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Frank a. Greco from comment #0)
> Disabling pulse audio did fix problem.

After confirming bug 211684 fix try wiping ~/.config/pulse then restart the server: "pacmd exit" then reload browser tab. Otherwise, not enough details.

2016Q3 package set as part of 11.0-RELEASE media is NOT supported anymore. Make sure you're using 2016Q4 or /head.
